title: .vcd file differ for --threads=1 and --threads=6
body:
I would have thought that the .vcd files should be identical, regardless of multithreading. 

If they were, it would be a great way to verify that the simulation result is identical by diffing the .vcd files.

Some differences are innocuos, but they make it hard to compare .vcd files. The "4x" below is for the single threaded case, whereas "`3!" is used in the multithreaded case.

```
   $var wire 64 4x aptos_io_cacheInterface_address [63:0] $end
   $var wire  1 E0 aptos_io_cacheInterface_read $end
```
